eas_text: A civil authority has issued A FIRE WARNING for the following counties or areas: Elmore, ID; at 10:08 PM on MAY 26, 2026 Effective until 3:08 AM MAY 27, 2026. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: All residents except for those who live on High Desert Dr can return to their homes. If you live on High Desert and need assistance, call 208-587-2100 opt 1.
